home-page.title: Find an archival file online ― easily!
home-page.description: Duck Inspector is a search service that allows you to find an archive file online. Just enter the details of the archive, fund, description, and file and get a link to the source.

about.title: Duck Inspector is:
about.one-place: aggregated data from archival resources in one place
about.extended-data: extended info with coordinates and dates
about.form: simple search form to find the file you need in seconds
about.direct-link: 24/7 monitoring for links to online copies
about.free: community driven and free to use
about.universe: integrated with tools of Duck Universe and other friendly services
about.open-source: open source code and data for everyone

daily-updates-page.title: Daily Report
daily-updates-page.description: A list of new archive files found online in the last 24 hours.
daily-updates-page.limit-note: The maximum number of findings is limited to 25,000.

metadata.title: Duck Inspector ― search for Ukrainian archive files online
metadata.description: A service for searching Ukrainian archive files available online. Enter the file details in a simple search window and get a link to the source.
metadata.fund-description: Search for files online in the fund {archiveCode}-{fundCode}{fundTitle} / archive {archiveCode} fund {fundCode} / {archiveCode} f.{fundCode}
metadata.description-description: Search for files online in the description {archiveCode}-{fundCode}-{descriptionCode}{descriptionTitle} / archive {archiveCode} fund {fundCode} description {descriptionCode} / {archiveCode} f.{fundCode}, d.{descriptionCode}
metadata.case-description: File online {archiveCode}-{fundCode}-{descriptionCode}-{caseCode}{fileTitle} / archive {archiveCode} fund {fundCode} description {descriptionCode} file {caseCode} / {archiveCode} f.{fundCode}, d.{descriptionCode}, c.{caseCode}
